slides.title: Lateral raises, *high reps*
slides.body: 15 to 20 reps. Leave the ego at home.

slides.title: Don't skip *rear delts*
slides.body: Most people have none. Hit them.

slides.title: Train them *often*
slides.body: Delts recover fast. Hit them a lot.

slides.title: Build the *delts*.
slides.body: Vibe Health keeps your training and protein on track.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store
